title: Looking for Category Manager at Specsmakers

jsonLd.title: Looking for Category Manager at Specsmakers
jsonLd.description:
Join the Specsmakers family as a Category Manager in Chennai. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Specsmakers:
Specsmakers is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual performance appraisal
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Specsmakers!
